description: Import the 2D architectural CAD file 'site_plan.dxf' from 'C:\workspace\data\site_plan.dxf' into TopoCal to extract discrete survey points for field stakeout. Generate numbered survey points at the vertices of all imported polylines. Export the resulting point coordinates (X/Y) to 'C:\workspace\data\stakeout_points.csv' and save the TopoCal project to 'C:\workspace\data\prepared_stakeout.top'.
